common.tagline: Record it. Transcribe it. Understand it.

landing.heroTitle: Hours of audio, summarized in minutes.
landing.heroSubtitle: Record live or upload a file. Summarex transcribes it, surfaces the key points, and turns long audio — meetings, lectures, interviews, podcasts — into something you can skim and share.
landing.featuresTitle: From raw audio to clear next steps.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Four steps, one workflow. From a long recording to something you can actually use.

record.title: Record or upload
record.description: Capture audio in the browser or drop a file. MP3, WAV, M4A, WebM — all handled.

transcribe.title: Whisper-grade transcripts
transcribe.description: Accurate, timestamped, multilingual transcripts you can scrub through and search.

summarize.title: Claude summaries
summarize.description: Decisions, action items, sentiment, and key quotes — pulled out automatically.

share.title: Share with one link
share.description: Generate a public read-only view your team can open without an account.

landing.demoTitle: What the AI actually gives you.
landing.demoSubtitle: A real-looking example so you know what to expect on the other side.
landing.demoOverviewText: Q2 planning sync covering the pricing experiment results and rollout plan. Strong alignment on next steps.
landing.demoDecision1: Roll the pricing change to 100% of users on Tuesday.
landing.demoDecision2: Revisit churn metrics in two weeks.
landing.demoAction1Task: Send the rollout announcement email to all customers.
landing.finalCtaTitle: Stop scrubbing audio. Start finding what matters.
landing.finalCtaSubtitle: Free during beta. No credit card. No setup.

auth.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to access your recordings, or create an account in seconds.
auth.toSignUp: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.toSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.checkEmailBody: We've sent you a confirmation link. Click it to activate your account, then come back to sign in.
auth.resetSentBody: If an account exists for that address, you'll receive an email with a link to reset your password.
auth.errorInvalidCredentials: That email or password doesn't look right. Please try again.
auth.errorEmailInUse: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead.
auth.errorWeakPassword: Your password is too short. Use at least 6 characters.
auth.errorEmailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email first. Check your inbox for the activation link.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

dashboard.title: Your recordings
dashboard.subtitle: Every recording you've captured or uploaded — searchable and ready to revisit.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Record audio or upload a file — it'll appear here once processing is done.
dashboard.emptySearchDescription: Nothing matches that search. Try a different title or clear the box to see everything.
dashboard.deleteConfirmBody: and its transcript, summary, and audio file will be permanently removed. This can't be undone.

recording.title: Start a recording
recording.subtitle: Record live from your browser or upload audio you already have. Either way works.
recording.recordHint: Tap the mic to start. Pause or stop anytime.
recording.uploadHint: Drop in an audio file or pick one from your computer.
recording.permissionDeniedHelp: Enable the mic for this site in your browser settings, then try again.
recording.startFailed: Couldn't start recording. Please try again.
recording.invalidFile: Unsupported format. Use MP3, WAV, M4A, or WebM.
recording.fileTooLarge: That file is over 100 MB. Try a smaller one.

meeting.regenerateConfirmBody: We'll re-run the summary on the existing transcript. The current summary will be replaced.
meeting.deleteConfirmBody: and its transcript, summary, and audio file will be permanently removed. This can't be undone.

processing.title: Processing your recording
processing.subtitle: Hang tight — this usually takes 1–3 minutes.

share.title: Share this recording
share.description: Anyone with this link can open
share.revokeConfirm: This will invalidate the existing link. Anyone holding it will lose access.
share.disclosure: Read-only view of the transcript and summary. No audio file is shared.

shared.title: Shared recording
shared.expiredOrInvalid: This share link is invalid or has been revoked.

errors.networkError: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.
errors.boundaryBody: An unexpected error interrupted the app. Reload to start fresh.
